<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <base href="../../">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
        <title>Arcane Markdown Document Component Example</title>

        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./arcane/css/layout.css?v=3">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./arcane/css/theme.css?v=1">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./arcane/css/primitives.css?v=1">
        <script type="module" src="./arcane/modules/ThemeBootstrap.js?v=1"></script>
        <script type="module" src="./arcane/modules/HTMLImport.js?v=2"></script>

        <style>
            body{
                box-sizing:border-box;
                display:block;
                min-height:100vh;
                padding:clamp(1rem,4vw,3rem);
            }

            main{
                margin:0 auto;
                max-width:70rem;
            }

            .controls{
                display:flex;
                flex-wrap:wrap;
                gap:.5rem;
                margin-block:1rem;
            }

            .example-document{
                background:var(--modal-background);
                border:1px solid var(--border-color);
                border-radius:.75rem;
                display:block;
                min-height:18rem;
                padding:clamp(1rem,3vw,2rem);
            }

            .example-output{
                background:var(--secondary-color);
                border:1px solid var(--border-color);
                border-radius:.5rem;
                min-height:4rem;
                overflow:auto;
                padding:1rem;
                white-space:pre-wrap;
            }
        </style>
    </head>

    <body>
        <main>
            <h1>Markdown document component</h1>
            <p>
                This synthetic example renders source-aware Markdown, builds an
                on-page table of contents, and lets the parent own document routes.
            </p>

            <div class="controls" aria-label="Document state examples">
                <button id="loadDocument" type="button">Load document</button>
                <button id="showError" type="button">Show error state</button>
                <button id="clearDocument" type="button">Show empty state</button>
            </div>

            <html-import
                id="exampleDocument"
                class="example-document"
                href="./arcane/components/markdown-document.html?v=1"
            ></html-import>

            <h2>Parent event log</h2>
            <pre id="exampleOutput" class="example-output" aria-live="polite">Waiting for the shared component…</pre>
        </main>

        <script type="module">
            import waitForComponent from './arcane/modules/WaitForComponent.js';

            const documentHost=document.querySelector('#exampleDocument');
            const output=document.querySelector('#exampleOutput');
            const loadButton=document.querySelector('#loadDocument');
            const errorButton=document.querySelector('#showError');
            const clearButton=document.querySelector('#clearDocument');
            const sourceURL=new URL(
                './example/component_markdown_document/guides/start.md',
                document.baseURI
            ).href;
            const syntheticMarkdown=[
                '# Safe Markdown rendering',
                '',
                'The parent supplies reviewed Markdown and its source URL.',
                '',
                '## Source-aware assets',
                '',
                '![Synthetic document icon](../../../arcane/img/doc.svg)',
                '',
                'Relative assets resolve from the Markdown source, not from the page route.',
                '',
                '## Repeated heading',
                '',
                'The table of contents receives a stable identifier.',
                '',
                '## Repeated heading',
                '',
                'A duplicate heading receives a collision-free identifier.',
                '',
                '## Parent-owned route',
                '',
                '[Open the next synthetic guide](../reference/next.md#details)',
                '',
                '<html-import href="./untrusted-component.html">This subtree is rejected.</html-import>'
            ].join('\n');
            const nextMarkdown=[
                '# Next synthetic guide',
                '',
                '## Details',
                '',
                'The parent handled the Markdown route and supplied this replacement content.',
                '',
                '[Return to the first guide](../guides/start.md)'
            ].join('\n');

            const viewer=await waitForComponent(
                documentHost,
                {
                    event:'markdown-document-ready',
                    methods:['clear','configure','fail','focus','load','render'],
                    property:'ready'
                }
            );

            viewer.configure(
                {
                    labels:{
                        content:'Synthetic Markdown document',
                        tableOfContents:'Example contents'
                    },
                    onNavigate(detail){
                        output.textContent=`Parent routed ${detail.href}\n${detail.targetURL}`;
                        if(detail.targetURL.includes('/reference/next.md')){
                            viewer.render(
                                nextMarkdown,
                                {sourceURL:detail.targetURL}
                            );
                            viewer.focus();
                        }else if(detail.targetURL.includes('/guides/start.md')){
                            viewer.render(
                                syntheticMarkdown,
                                {sourceURL:detail.targetURL}
                            );
                            viewer.focus();
                        }
                    },
                    sourceURL
                }
            );

            viewer.addEventListener(
                'markdown-document-state',
                event=>{
                    output.textContent=[
                        `state=${event.detail.state}`,
                        `source=${event.detail.sourceURL}`
                    ].join('\n');
                }
            );
            viewer.addEventListener(
                'markdown-document-navigate',
                event=>{
                    output.textContent=`navigate=${event.detail.kind}\n${event.detail.targetURL}`;
                }
            );

            async function loadSyntheticDocument(){
                await viewer.load(
                    async ()=>({markdown:syntheticMarkdown,sourceURL}),
                    {sourceURL}
                );
            }

            loadButton.addEventListener('click',loadSyntheticDocument);
            errorButton.addEventListener(
                'click',
                ()=>viewer.fail(new Error('Synthetic source is unavailable.'))
            );
            clearButton.addEventListener('click',()=>viewer.clear());

            await loadSyntheticDocument();
        </script>
    </body>
</html>
